name: test-everything
description: Comprehensive testing toolkit: audit coverage gaps, plan testing strategies, scaffold test infrastructure, review test quality, and enforce tests as immutable contracts — with agent-team enforcement (argue and debate until green), confrontational fix mandates, user-story-driven E2E testing, click-through verification (no API shortcuts), interaction verification, exhaustive interaction crawling, desired outcome assessment, UX/UI quality auditing, and sandbox-safe E2E patterns for reliable Playwright execution in Claude Code
